Unforgettable Experiences

Discover the best of the Costa Rican Pacific

Whale Watching
Turtle Nesting
Free Yoga
Live Music
Whale Watching

Season from July to October

Each year, majestic humpback whales migrate to the warm waters of the Costa Rican Pacific to mate and give birth. From Playa Hermosa, you can enjoy this natural spectacle.

Turtle Nesting

A unique conservation experience

Playa Hermosa is one of the main sea turtle nesting sites in Costa Rica. During the season, you can witness the ancient nesting ritual and, in other periods, the exciting release of baby turtles into the sea.

We work alongside local conservation projects to protect this endangered species. An educational and deeply moving experience, perfect for the whole family.

Free Yoga

Sundays 8:00 AM · Saturdays 4:00 PM · Wednesdays 8:00 AM

Start your day in harmony with free yoga classes by the sea, open to all our guests. The sound of the waves and the Pacific breeze create the perfect setting to reconnect with yourself.

Our sessions are suitable for all levels, from beginners to advanced practitioners. All you need is the desire to enjoy and feel the energy of the place.

Live Music

Weekends at the restaurant

Every weekend, our restaurant comes alive with great music from local artists. The perfect combination for an open-air dinner by the sea.

Enjoy tropical cocktails, Mediterranean cuisine, and a relaxed atmosphere under the stars. The ideal way to close a perfect day in the Pacific.
